title: AI Tools Explorer
description: A web application built with React to discover and explore the best AI tools available. Features a dynamic and responsive interface.

title: OTT Subscription Manager
description: A full-stack application to help users save money by managing their OTT platform subscriptions. Includes a Node.js backend.

title: Republic of Novara
description: A conceptual government website portfolio piece with a focus on clean UI/UX and accessibility. Built with static HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

title: PPT generator using API
description: A web application that generates PowerPoint presentations from user-provided content using a REST API.

title: Advanced Interactive Piano
description: A fully interactive web-based piano built with JavaScript, TailwindCSS, and Tone.js. Play with multiple instruments, reverb, sustain pedal, and more—all in your browser!

title: C Programming Basics to Advance
description: This is a self improvement project where all the basics of C programming is enlisted with code.

title: EEvolution : Digital Hub for electrical engineering batch 2
description: EEvolution is a digital hub designed to connect and empower the electrical engineering batch 2 community. It serves as a platform for sharing knowledge, resources, and opportunities related to electrical engineering. The hub features forums for discussion, a repository of study materials, and a calendar of events such as workshops and guest lectures. By fostering collaboration and communication among students, EEvolution aims to enhance learning experiences and career prospects for its members.
